modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help to install Visio software on my computer.

full_description_text: I want to install Visio software. I am not sure how to do it on my Windows computer. I am a student and need it for my work. Please help me with the steps.
short_description: Need help to install Visio software on my computer.
description: I want to install Visio software. I am not sure how to do it on my Windows computer. I am a student and need it for my work. Please help me with the steps.
